verdict: Absolutely unhinged behaviour. The council has unanimously voted to revoke your internet privileges.
We called a meeting. Everyone agreed. You need to stop.
Desperate behaviour detected. Please regain composure immediately.
Sir/Madam, this is a Wendy's. And even we have standards.
The FBI has opened a file. Not a legal one. Just a 'keep an eye on this one' file.
Chaotic energy. Unpredictable. Slightly concerning. We're watching you.
You are the warning label on a product no one thought needed a warning label.
Bold move. Could've gone worse. Didn't go great. 4/10.
The audacity is almost admirable. Almost.
You're not the villain of this story. You're the cautionary footnote.
Morally grey. You exist somewhere between a villain and a cautionary tale.
Not ideal. Not a disaster. You're the beige of human decisions.
The internet shrugs. And that might be the harshest judgement of all.
Questionable, but survivable. You'll be fine. Probably.
We've seen worse. We've seen better. You're aggressively average.
Passing grade. Don't let it go to your head.
Solid effort. Minor crimes committed. The jury is largely sympathetic.
You did a thing. It wasn't perfect. But here you are, standing tall.
Seven out of ten people on the jury voted in your favour. The others are still suspicious.
Genuinely not bad. The internet is mildly impressed, which is rare.
Character unlocked: Competent Adult. Cherish this moment.
We didn't expect that. Respect. Modest, limited respect, but still.
Exceptional. We don't know how you pulled that off but respect.
Almost perfect. There's a 1-point penalty for making the rest of us look bad.
Perfect 10. You have transcended the human experience. We're not worthy.
The internet has awarded you a gold star and a restraining order — out of admiration.
Your mum saw this and she's not coming to pick you up anymore.
Scientists have officially reclassified this as a cry for help.
We've forwarded this to your GP. Please book an appointment.
You typed this out, read it back, and still hit send. That's the real crime.
A therapist saw this over our shoulder and wrote three pages of notes.
Your ancestors fought wars so you could do this. Reflect on that.
There's a support group for people like you. Attendance is mandatory.
We showed this to a golden retriever. Even it looked disappointed.
Somewhere, a LinkedIn influencer is turning this into a 'lessons learned' post.
You're not the main character. You're not even in the credits.
Certified Unhinged™ but in, like, a totally boring way.
This has the same energy as replying 'you too' when a waiter says enjoy your meal.
Honestly? We've judged worse today. The bar is just very, very low.
Not great, not terrible. You're the 3.6 roentgen of human behaviour.
Could've been way worse. Wasn't. That's growth, apparently.
The jury deliberated for 4 minutes. You should feel neither proud nor ashamed.
Surprisingly sane decision from someone who came to this website for validation.
We're not saying you're a good person. We're saying this wasn't your lowest moment.
Top 3% of confessions this week. The competition was not stiff, but still.
Almost perfect. Docking one point because you clearly enjoyed it too much.
